title: Merger Professionals: What is the role of investment bankers in mergers and...
summary: Describe the role of investment bankers in identifying targets, negotiating, and structuring M&A deals.
prompt: What is the role of investment bankers in mergers and acquisitions?

options.text: Investment bankers play a critical role in M&A by helping firms identify

solution: Investment bankers play a critical role in M&A by helping firms identify suitable targets, facilitating negotiations, and advising on deal structuring and financing options.
